Mobile Astronaut: thumbs, towers, and timing

Your network is part of the game. Treat it as seriously as stake size.

Play Astronaut Claim bonus

Interface edges that matter

Large buttons help, but only if animations stay smooth. Restart the client if frames drop — hesitation is costly.

Network reality

Wi‑Fi with clean airtime usually beats marginal LTE for timing-sensitive cashouts. Crowded venues spike packet loss.

Stable Wi‑Fi
Best default for serious sessions.
Travel mode
Lower stakes if signal fluctuates.

Frequently asked questions

Why did my cashout fail?

Often latency or late entry. Document the issue for support with timestamps.
